description: A rigorous truncation error analysis to propagate the finite N=40 Chebyshev collocation Galerkin spectrum to the infinite-dimensional operator, as in Duarte–Koch 2020, is not yet implemented. Current data only provide numerical lower bounds for σ_p. To fix, detailed norm estimates and spectral enclosure methods must be carried out for each p.
action_taken: A Duarte-Koch (2020) style truncation error analysis has not been performed. This is explicitly documented as a known limitation in the finding page under 'Important caveats (DISPUTED — not yet rigorous)'. The certification level (bronze) and verdict (ACCEPT_WITH_REVISION) reflect this incomplete state. Implementing the truncation error analysis is future work, not a misrepresentation.
